sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, salary FLOAT);

MERGE INTO employees USING (SELECT 2 AS id, 'Bob' AS name, 97000.0 AS salary) AS updates ON (updates.id = employees.id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET salary = updates.salary WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT;
MERGE INTO employees USING (SELECT 1 AS id) AS deletes ON (deletes.id = employees.id) WHEN MATCHED THEN DELETE;
